name: flow/flow-controls
description: Zoom in / out / fit-view controls for a flow canvas — real, i18n-labeled buttons.

meta.name: FlowControls
meta.description: Zoom in / out / fit-view controls for a flow canvas — real, i18n-labeled buttons.

props.name: showZoom
props.description: When true, shows the zoom-in/zoom-out buttons.

props.name: showFitView
props.description: When true, shows the fit-to-view button.

props.name: onZoomIn
props.description: Called when the zoom-in control is activated.

props.name: onZoomOut
props.description: Called when the zoom-out control is activated.

props.name: onFitView
props.description: Called when the fit-to-view control is activated.

props.name: labels
props.description: Overrides for the component’s user-visible strings (i18n).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Canvas controls
examples.code:
() => (
{}} onZoomOut={() => {}} onFitView={() => {}} />
)

whenToUse: Giving users explicit zoom/fit controls on a flow canvas
intent.a11yRationale: Real <button>s with i18n-defaulted aria-labels; ≥44px coarse targets.
